name: hdr-toggle
title: HDR Toggle
description: Toggle Windows HDR on individual monitors instead of all displays at once.
author: abdullah_shabib

commands.name: toggle-hdr
commands.title: Toggle HDR
commands.subtitle: Per-Monitor HDR
commands.description: List HDR-capable monitors and toggle HDR on each one independently. Assign monitors to shortcut slots here.

commands.name: toggle-hdr-1
commands.title: Toggle HDR – Shortcut 1
commands.subtitle: Per-Monitor HDR
commands.description: Toggle HDR on the monitor assigned to Shortcut 1. Assign a monitor in the Toggle HDR command, then give this command a hotkey in Raycast.

commands.title: Toggle HDR – Shortcut 2
commands.subtitle: Per-Monitor HDR
commands.description: Toggle HDR on the monitor assigned to Shortcut 2. Assign a monitor in the Toggle HDR command, then give this command a hotkey in Raycast.

commands.description: Toggle HDR on the monitor assigned to Shortcut 3. Assign a monitor in the Toggle HDR command, then give this command a hotkey in Raycast.
